common.securityFooter: 256-bit SSL encryption · GDPR compliant · Auto-deleted after verification

app.invalidLinkMessage: The verification link appears to be invalid or expired. Please request a new verification link from the organization.
app.invalidStatusMessage: The status link appears to be invalid. Please check your verification email or contact support.
app.portalMessage: This is a secure portal for identity verification. To begin verification, you'll need a verification link provided by the requesting organization.
app.needHelpMessage: If you believe you should have access to this verification portal, please contact the organization that requested your verification.

country.title: Select Your Country
country.subtitle: Choose the country that issued your identity document.
country.heading: Where was your ID issued?
country.description: Select the country that issued your identity document, then choose the document type.

documentType.title: Select Document Type
documentType.subtitle: Choose the type of identity document you will be verifying.

frontId.heading: Scan the front of your ID
frontId.description: Position your ID card and take a clear photo. Make sure all four corners are visible and the text is clear.
frontId.tips: Good lighting · No glare · Hold steady
frontId.helperText: This helps us verify your document accurately
frontId.uploadHint: JPG, PNG up to 10MB — drag & drop or click

backId.heading: Now flip it over and scan the back
backId.description: Keep the same conditions — good lighting, flat surface. The barcode on the back must be fully visible.

liveCapture.heading: Take a quick live capture
liveCapture.description: We need to confirm your identity matches your ID. Look directly at the camera in a well-lit area.
liveCapture.tips: Remove glasses · Face well-lit · No hat
liveCapture.positionFace: Position your face within the circle
liveCapture.livenessDetectionDesc: Our system will automatically detect that you're a real person and capture your photo when optimal conditions are met.

success.heading: Verification complete
success.message: Your identity has been verified. You can close this page.

failure.heading: Verification Failed
failure.message: Your verification could not be completed.
failure.helpText: Please review the details and try again, or contact support for assistance.

manualReview.heading: Under Review
manualReview.message: Your verification is being manually reviewed.
manualReview.timeline: We'll send you an update within 24 hours.

staleLink.heading: Verification Link Used
staleLink.message: If you need to verify again, please request a new link from the organization.

status.verified: Your identity has been successfully verified!
status.failed: Identity verification failed. Please contact support.
status.manualReview: Your documents are under manual review. We'll notify you once complete.

errors.invalidLink: Invalid link — no session token provided.
errors.processingTimeout: Document processing timed out. Please try again.
errors.ocrTimeout: OCR timed out. Please try again.
errors.takingLonger: Verification is taking longer than expected.
errors.alreadySubmitted: This verification was already submitted. Please check your status.
errors.somethingWrongMessage: We're sorry, but something unexpected happened. Please try refreshing the page or contact support if the issue persists.
errors.cameraAccessDenied: Unable to access your camera. Please check permissions and try again.

desktop.selectCountryDocDesc: Tell us about the document you'll be verifying
